description: A close-up study of a woman pressing her face against a small child she holds tightly in her arms. The woman has brown hair pulled back and wears a blue garment that leaves one shoulder bare. The child, with light curly hair, nestles against her chest. The background is dark and indistinct. The painting captures an intensely tender moment of maternal embrace, with warm flesh tones and soft lighting emphasizing the intimacy of the bond.

_meta.title: Woman and Child. Study for the Martyrdom of Saint Symphorien
